mapper.sql: id, order_no, item_id, order_status, seller_id, original_json, export_count, used_count, create_time, modify_time, creator, modifier, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM orders WHERE deleted = 0
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND order_status = #{orderStatus}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET used_count = used_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS orders ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键ID',
-- 业务字段 order_no VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '订单编号', item_id BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '商品ID', order_status TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '订单状态：0-未知，1-已创建，2-已付款，3-已发货，4-交易成功，5-已退款，6-交易关闭', seller_id BIGINT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '商家ID', original_json TEXT COMMENT '平台回调原始JSON', export_count INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '导出次数权益', used_count INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '已使用次数',
-- 标准字段 create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', modify_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '修改时间', creator VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '创建人', modifier VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '修改人', deleted TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '逻辑删除：0-未删除，1-已删除',
-- 索引 UNIQUE KEY uk_order_no (order_no) COMMENT '订单号唯一索引', INDEX idx_item_id (item_id) COMMENT '商品ID索引', INDEX idx_order_status (order_status) COMMENT '订单状态索引', INDEX idx_seller_id (seller_id) COMMENT '商家ID索引', INDEX idx_create_time (create_time) COMMENT '创建时间索引', INDEX idx_modify_time (modify_time) COMMENT '修改时间索引' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='订单表'
